---
title: "The Raph Round-up: June 2026"
author: "Raphael Eisenhofer"
date: "2026-07-07"
categories: [monthly]
image: "photos/fotm_thumbnail.jpg"
lightbox: true
---

..

### Forest frolic

::: {layout-ncol="1"}
![Untitled 1\
© 2026.](photos/har1.jpg){group="forest"}
:::

::: {layout-ncol="2"}
![Late bloomers\
© 2026.](photos/har2.jpg){group="forest"}

![The last of the ephemerals #1\
© 2026.](photos/har3.jpg){group="forest"}
:::

::: {layout-ncol="3"}
![Late bloomers\
© 2026.](photos/har4.jpg){group="forest"}

![The last of the ephemerals #1\
© 2026.](photos/har5.jpg){group="forest"}

![The last of the ephemerals #1\
© 2026.](photos/har6.jpg){group="forest"}
:::

::: {layout-ncol="2"}
![Late bloomers\
© 2026.](photos/har7.jpg){group="forest"}

![The last of the ephemerals #1\
© 2026.](photos/har8.jpg){group="forest"}
:::

### Worlds up high

..

::: {layout-ncol="3"}
![Late bloomers\
© 2026.](photos/cloud1.jpg){group="cloud"}

![The last of the ephemerals #1\
© 2026.](photos/cloud2.jpg){group="cloud"}

![The last of the ephemerals #1\
© 2026.](photos/cloud3.jpg){group="cloud"}
:::

::: {layout-ncol="1"}
![The inside is quite spacious..\
© 2026.](photos/cloud4.jpg){group="cloud"}
:::

::: {layout-ncol="1"}
![..and home to more life!\
© 2026.](photos/cloud5.jpg){group="cloud"}
:::

### Rooftop worlds

..

::: {layout-ncol="2"}
![Pointing.\
© 2026.](photos/rooftop1.jpg){group="rooftop"}

![Survivor.\
© 2026.](photos/rooftop2.jpg){group="rooftop"}
:::

::: {layout-ncol="2"}
![Pointing.\
© 2026.](photos/rooftop3.jpg){group="rooftop"}

![Survivor.\
© 2026.](photos/rooftop4.jpg){group="rooftop"}
:::

::: {layout-ncol="2"}
![Pointing.\
© 2026.](photos/rooftop5.jpg){group="rooftop"}

![Survivor.\
© 2026.](photos/rooftop6.jpg){group="rooftop"}
:::

### Multiple exposures

::: {layout-ncol="2"}
![Pointing.\
© 2026.](photos/me0.jpg){group="me"}

![Survivor.\
© 2026.](photos/me1.jpg){group="me"}

![Pointing.\
© 2026.](photos/me2.jpg){group="me"}

![Survivor.\
© 2026.](photos/me3.jpg){group="me"}
:::

### Eye of a storm

::: {layout-ncol="1"}
![Burden.\
© 2026.](photos/lightning.jpg){group="lightning"}
:::

### Photo of the month

..

![The bridge.\
© 2026.](photos/fotm.jpg)

### Interesting things I've read/watched
